revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Asakura-jinja (Uji, Kyoto)]][[ja:旦椋神社 (宇治市)]] {{Expand Japanese|旦椋神社 (宇治市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Asakura Shrine (Q11510876) | native_name = 旦椋神社 (宇治市) | image = Asakura Jinja Uji Haiden.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Asakura Shrine (Q11510876) | coordinates = {{coord|34.872586|135.774907}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Takamimusubi|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi|de|Takamimusubi|en|Takamimusubi|es|Takami-musubi-no-kami|fa|تاکامیموسوبی|fr|Takamimusubi|id|Takamimusubi|ja|タカミムスヒ|ks|تاکامِمُسُبی|pl|Takamimusubi|ru|Такамимусуби-но ками|zh|高皇產靈尊|qid=Q125400|1=Takamimusubi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Asakura Shrine'''|旦椋神社 (宇治市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * Province|ja|山城国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11467693|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province}} ** Series ordinal: 68 ** P155: {{ill|Q11548558|ltq=Q11548558|qid=Q11548558|1=Mito Shrine (Q11548558)}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135038799|ltq=Q135038799|qid=Q135038799|1=Isetano Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Uji|lt=Uji|ar|يوجي (كيوتو)|azb|اوجی، کیوتو|bn|উজি, কিয়োটা|ca|Uji|ce|Удзи|cs|Udži (Kjóto)|de|Uji (Kyōto)|devoyage|Uji|en|Uji|envoyage|Uji|eo|Uĝi|es|Uji (Kioto)|eu|Uji (Kyoto)|fa|اوجی، کیوتو|fi|Uji|fr|Uji|frvoyage|Uji|gl|Uji|hr|Uji|hu|Udzsi|hy|Ուձի|id|Uji, Kyōto|it|Uji|itvoyage|Uji|ja|宇治市|javoyage|宇治市|ko|우지시|lt|Udžis|mg|Uji|mn|Үжи|ms|Uji, Kyoto|mzn|اوجی، کیوتو|nl|Uji|no|Uji|pl|Uji (miasto)|pt|Uji|ro|Uji|ru|Удзи|sh|Uji|simple|Uji|sr|Уџи|sv|Uji, Kyōto|szl|Uji (mjasto)|tg|Уҷи|th|อูจิ|tl|Uji|tr|Uji|tt|Удзи|uk|Удзі (Кіото)|vi|Uji, Kyōto|war|Uji, Kyoto|zh_classical|宇治市|zh_min_nan|Uzi-chhī|zh_yue|宇治|zh|宇治市|zhvoyage|宇治|qid=Q326956|1=Uji}} * {{ill|Q749276|ltq=Q749276|qid=Q749276|1=Yamashiro Province}} * {{ill|Kuse District, Kyoto|lt=Kuse district|ceb|Kuse-gun|en|Kuse District, Kyoto|es|Distrito de Kuse|fr|District de Kuse|id|Distrik Kuse, Kyōto|it|Distretto di Kuse|ja|久世郡|ko|구세군 (교토부)|pl|Powiat Kuse|uk|Повіт Кусе|zh_yue|久世郡|zh|久世郡|qid=Q1076972|1=Kuse District, Kyoto}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.872586|135.774907}} == image (P18) == * Asakura Jinja Uji Haiden.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q125400|ltq=Q125400|qid=Q125400|1=Takamimusubi}} * {{ill|Q3275901|ltq=Q3275901|qid=Q3275901|1=Kamimusubi}} * {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|ar|سوغاوارا نو ميتشيزانه|br|Sugawara no Michizane|ckb|سوگاوارا نۆ میچیزانێ|de|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|ensource|Author:Sugawara no Michizane|es|Sugawara no Michizane|fa|سوگاوارا نو میچی‌زانه|fi|Sugawara no Michizane|fr|Sugawara no Michizane|id|Sugawara no Michizane|it|Sugawara no Michizane|itquote|Sugawara no Michizane|ja|菅原道真|jaquote|菅原道真|jasource|作者:菅原道真|kk|Сугавара но Митидзане|ko|스가와라노 미치자네|la|Sugawara no Michizane|ms|Sugawara no Michizane|nl|Sugawara no Michizane|nn|Sugawara no Michizane|pl|Michizane Sugawara|pt|Sugawara no Michizane|ru|Сугавара-но Митидзанэ|rusource|Автор:Сугавара-но Митидзанэ|sh|Sugawara no Michizane|sv|Sugawara no Michizane|th|สึกาวาระ โนะ มิจิซาเนะ|tr|Sugawara no Michizane|uk|Суґавара но Мітідзане|zh_classical|菅原道真|zh_min_nan|Sugawara no Mitizane|zh|菅原道真|zhsource|Author:菅原道眞|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 180637 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 7130005006881 == Commons category (P373) == * Asakura-jinja (Uji, Kyoto) == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '京都府宇治市大久保町北ノ山109', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '京都府宇治市大久保北ノ山', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Asakura-jinja (Uji, Kyoto)}} [[JA:旦椋神社 (宇治市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11510876}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=December 2025}}{{Shinto shrine |Name = Asakura Shrine |Image = [[File:Asakura Jinja Uji Haiden.jpg|270px]]
Worship hall |Location = {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Uji City|Q326956|qid=Q326956|1=Uji}} Okubo-chō Kitanoyama 109 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}}
{{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} |Rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = Unknown |Main hall = Two-bay {{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Other name = |Festival = {{ill|lt=October 8|Q2924|qid=Q2924|1=October 8}} |Rites = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Kyoto|label=Asakura Shrine|position=top|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Asakura Shrine''' (あさくらじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Okubo-chō Kitanoyama, {{ill|lt=Uji City|Q326956|qid=Q326956|1=Uji}}, {{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN|lt=minor Shikinaisha}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q3275901|lt=Kamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Kamimusubi}} * {{ill|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|Q382005|qid=Q382005|1=Sugawara no Michizane}} === History === The date of the shrine’s founding is unknown, but it is said that it was originally located in Okubo Asakura (west of the present site) in {{ill|lt=Uji City|Q326956|qid=Q326956|1=Uji}}. According to {{ill|lt=archaeological excavation|Q959782|qid=Q959782|1=Archaeological excavation}} of the former site, an earthen mound measuring 5.3 meters in length, 3.6 meters in width, and 50 centimeters in height remained in the middle of a rice field. Beneath the grass-covered topsoil, river stones approximately 20 centimeters in size were laid flat. Roof-tile fragments were excavated near the surface, leading to the supposition that a small shrine building once stood atop the stone pavement, probably facing south. In {{ill|lt=1550|Q6557|qid=Q6557|1=1550}} ({{ill|lt=Tenbun (Japanese era)|UNKNOWN|lt=Tenbun}} 19), the shrine buildings were destroyed by fire, but in {{ill|lt=1566|Q6638|qid=Q6638|1=1566}} ({{ill|lt=Eiroku|Q1143341|qid=Q1143341|1=Eiroku}} 9), shrine buildings were rebuilt on the site of Tenman Tenjin, where rituals had been discontinued for more than 20 years, and Tenman Tenjin was enshrined together. After the reconstruction, it was revered as the village {{ill|lt=ubusuna deity|Q1392097|qid=Q1392097|1=Ubusunagami}} and was called Tenjinsha, Kurikuma Tenjinsha, or Kurikuma Tenmangū. In August {{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}, and in June {{ill|lt=1877|Q7773|qid=Q7773|1=1877}} (Meiji 10), it was recognized as the Shikinaisha Asakurasha. === Grounds === * Main hall ({{ill|lt=Kyoto Prefecture|Q120730|qid=Q120730|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Registered Tangible Cultural Property|Q11579194|qid=Q11579194|1=Registered Tangible Cultural Property of Japan}}) ** Built in {{ill|lt=1672|Q7614|qid=Q7614|1=1672}} ({{ill|lt=Enpō|Q1145735|qid=Q1145735|1=Enpō}} 2). Registered on {{ill|lt=May 15|Q2562|qid=Q2562|1=May 15}}, {{ill|lt=1985|Q2431|qid=Q2431|1=1985}} ({{ill|lt=Shōwa|Q327567|qid=Q327567|1=Shōwa era}} 60). File:Asakura Jinja Uji Honden.jpg|Main hall File:Asakura Jinja Uji Ichinotorii.jpg|First torii gate File:Asakura_Jinja_Uji_Ninotorii.jpg|Second torii gate File:Asakura Jinja Uji Shinmon.jpg|Shrine gate File:Asakura Jinja Uji Shinboku.jpg|Sacred tree === Festivals === * Autumn Grand Festival ({{ill|lt=October 8|Q2924|qid=Q2924|1=October 8}}) === Access === * About a 5-minute walk southwest from {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Station (Kyoto Prefecture)|Q8081568|qid=Q8081568|lt=Ōkubo Station|1=Ōkubo Station (Kyoto)}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kyoto Line|Q1057349|qid=Q1057349|1=Kyoto Line (Kintetsu)}} * About a 12-minute walk southwest from {{ill|lt=Nitta Station (Kyoto Prefecture)|Q974100|qid=Q974100|lt=Nitta Station|1=Shinden Station (Kyoto)}} on the {{ill|lt=Nara Line|Q1157044|qid=Q1157044|lt=JR Nara Line|1=Nara Line (JR West)}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Asakura Shrine (Uji, Kyoto)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asakura Shrine (Uji, Kyoto)]][[Category:Kanpei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamashiro Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Uji, Kyoto]] [[Category:宇治市の建築物]] [[Category:Son-sha in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kyoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Uji, Kyoto]]
